description_long: This is a modern, high-back swivel chair with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark fabric. The chair features a tall, rectangular headrest integrated with the backrest, providing ample support for the head and neck. The seat and backrest are generously padded, with smooth, contoured lines for ergonomic comfort. It has curved armrests that are seamlessly attached to the seat, and a sturdy five-pointed star base made of metal, each leg ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is cylindrical and likely adjustable, supporting the seat above the base. The overall appearance is professional and suitable for office or conference room settings.
description: A modern, high-back swivel chair with dark upholstery, padded seat and back, curved armrests, and a five-caster metal base. The design is sleek and ergonomic, ideal for office environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall backrest with integrated headrest, wide padded seat, and curved armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's ergonomic contour, thick padding, and the cylindrical central support column with visible casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height of the backrest and headrest, as well as the symmetrical armrests and five-pointed base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the chair's profile, padding, and the structure of the support column and base.
attribute_central_support_column: Cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, finished in matte black.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and slightly contoured backrest with integrated headrest, upholstered in smooth dark fabric, no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests attached directly to the seat, covered in matching fabric, with a seamless and minimalist design.
